ProductConstraintModel.description: Constraint model for the 5G Smart Office edge router. Enforces: Router cannot be sold standalone — requires at least one active Unlimited 5G Core Data Plan on the same quote. Maximum 1 router per site. IMEI slot reference is mandatory at order activation. See ADR-006.

constraint.description: Router requires at least one Data Plan line item on the same quote.
Maximum 1 router unit per site — enforced per OrderItem site grouping.
